entities.name: FOOD VALUE CHAINS
entities.description: Systems that deliver nutrition and micronutrients to consumers

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential vitamins and minerals targeted for delivery through food systems

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing or obtaining the food necessary for health and growth

entities.name: AGRI-FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Integrated approaches addressing hunger and malnutrition through agricultural development

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: A state of deficiency in food intake

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Deficiencies, excesses, or imbalances in a person's intake of energy and/or nutrients

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving agricultural productivity and sustainability to improve nutrition

entities.name: PRISMA
entities.description: Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses, a standard for reporting systematic reviews

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A research method used to assess and synthesize evidence on value chains and micronutrients

entities.name: IMPACT PATHWAYS
entities.description: Interventions designed to improve micronutrient delivery and consumption

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: An impact pathway focused on the production of micronutrient-rich foods

entities.name: ACCESSIBILITY
entities.description: An impact pathway focused on making micronutrient-rich foods available

entities.name: MARKETING
entities.description: An impact pathway focused on the promotion and sale of micronutrient-rich foods

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: An impact pathway focused on increasing financial means to access micronutrient-rich foods

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE AND BEHAVIORAL
entities.description: An impact pathway focused on education and behavioral change regarding nutrition

entities.name: WOMEN’S EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: An impact pathway focused on empowering women to improve nutritional outcomes

entities.name: MULTI-STAKEHOLDER INTEGRATED APPROACH
entities.description: A collaborative strategy involving various stakeholders to make value chains micronutrient-sensitive

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where literature on micronutrients in food value chains is scarce

entities.name: HIDDEN HUNGER
entities.description: A form of malnutrition characterized by a lack of micronutrients
